name: dryft
description: Feature contracts for AI coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Dryft gives AI coding agents a structured, queryable view of your codebase's features. Agents call MCP tools to create a persistent local change contract against dryft.yml before editing, then verify the actual git diff and produce a Dryft Receipt before final response.
defaultPrompt: Before editing files, ask Dryft to plan the change against the feature map and save the changeId.
Before final response, ask Dryft to verify the actual git diff against the changeId and include the Dryft Receipt.
List the features in this codebase using Dryft.
